title: Go server version/status/hardware/logs local parity candidate

evidence.disabled_gate: server/system routes return 405 until --enable-server-system is set
evidence.status_shape: version, system stats, hardware, logs, consistency, and clear-history responses are exercised through HTTP against a copied DB/data dir
evidence.local_only: server routes enforce localhost request origin in the Go candidate

boundaries: Does not promote production/default server/system ownership.
Does not deploy Pi, edit Caddy or systemd, change frontend defaults, touch production DB/files, remove Python, or expand public exposure.
